title: Add comprehensive Playwright E2E test suite
description: Expand existing 2-file/17-test Playwright setup into comprehensive suite covering all pages, flows, mobile, a11y, and error states. Uses hybrid API strategy with route interception mocks and separate smoke suite. See openspec/changes/add-playwright-e2e-tests/
close_reason: All 51 files implemented: test infrastructure, 37 test files, page objects, config updates, and documentation

title: Update documentation for Neon
description: Update docs/SETUP.md with Neon configuration section. Add agent workflow documentation and update CLAUDE.md with Neon-specific guidance.

title: Create integration test fixtures
description: Create tests/integration/fixtures/neon.py with pytest fixtures for ephemeral Neon test branches. Skip if NEON_API_KEY not set.

title: Add Railway integration test fixtures
description: Create integration test fixture in tests/integration/fixtures/railway.py that auto-skips without Railway credentials. Add Docker image test in CI that builds the image and verifies extensions. Covers original tasks 6.3 and 6.4 from add-railway-providers.

title: Validate Railway deployment end-to-end
description: Test local development with Railway provider using mock credentials. Deploy a test instance to Railway and verify: PostgreSQL with all extensions, MinIO storage operations, application connectivity, connection pool behavior under load. Covers original tasks 8.4 and 8.5 from add-railway-providers.

title: OpenSpec: Add Supabase Cloud Database Support
description:
Implementing OpenSpec proposal: add-supabase-cloud-database

This epic adds Supabase as a cloud PostgreSQL provider option while maintaining backward compatibility with local PostgreSQL. Users can bring their own Supabase instance (similar to kbroose/stash pattern).

Key changes:
- NEW: Database provider abstraction layer in src/storage/providers/
- NEW: Supabase-specific configuration with connection pooling
- NEW: Environment variable detection for automatic provider selection
- MODIFIED: src/storage/database.py to use provider abstraction
- MODIFIED: src/config/settings.py for Supabase config
- MODIFIED: docs/SETUP.md for Supabase setup instructions

OpenSpec location: openspec/changes/add-supabase-cloud-database/
close_reason: OpenSpec proposal add-supabase-cloud-database fully implemented. Created database provider abstraction, added Supabase configuration, refactored database.py, added documentation, created 26 unit tests, and validated with full test suite (69 tests passed).

title: Create provider module structure
description:
Task 1.1-1.5: Create database provider module

- Create src/storage/providers/__init__.py with provider exports
- Create src/storage/providers/base.py with DatabaseProvider protocol
- Create src/storage/providers/local.py for local PostgreSQL provider
- Create src/storage/providers/supabase.py for Supabase provider
- Create src/storage/providers/factory.py with provider detection and factory

Reference: openspec/changes/add-supabase-cloud-database/design.md
close_reason: Created provider module structure: base.py (Protocol), local.py (LocalPostgresProvider), supabase.py (SupabaseProvider), factory.py (get_provider)

title: Add Supabase configuration to settings
description:
Task 2.1-2.3: Update configuration

- Add Supabase database settings to src/config/settings.py:
  - supabase_project_ref: str | None
  - supabase_db_password: str | None
  - supabase_region: str = "us-east-1"
  - supabase_pooler_mode: Literal["transaction", "session"] = "transaction"
  - database_provider: Literal["local", "supabase"] | None (explicit override)
- Add get_database_url() method to construct URLs from Supabase config
- Add provider auto-detection property

Reference: openspec/changes/add-supabase-cloud-database/design.md (Decision 2 & 4)
close_reason: Added Supabase configuration to settings.py: supabase_project_ref, supabase_db_password, supabase_region, supabase_pooler_mode, supabase_direct_url, database_provider override. Added detected_database_provider property and get_effective_database_url/get_migration_database_url methods.

title: Refactor database.py to use provider factory
description:
Task 3.1-3.4: Refactor database module

- Update src/storage/database.py to use provider factory
- Configure engine with provider-specific options (pool size, SSL, timeouts)
- Add connection health check function
- Handle Supabase-specific connection errors gracefully

Dependencies: Requires task-1 (provider module) and task-2 (configuration)

Reference: openspec/changes/add-supabase-cloud-database/design.md (Decision 3)
close_reason: Refactored database.py to use provider factory. Added lazy initialization, health_check(), get_provider_name(), reset_connection(). Maintained backward compatibility with engine and SessionLocal.

title: Add Supabase documentation
description:
Task 4.1-4.4: Documentation

- Add Supabase setup section to docs/SETUP.md
- Document "bring your own Supabase" workflow
- Add troubleshooting section for common Supabase connection issues
- Document migration process with direct URL

Dependencies: Requires task-1, task-2, task-3 to be complete

Reference: openspec/changes/add-supabase-cloud-database/proposal.md
close_reason: Added comprehensive Supabase documentation to SETUP.md: setup guide, connection pooling modes, free tier limits, troubleshooting section, and environment variable reference.

title: Create provider tests
description:
Task 5.1-5.4: Testing

- Create unit tests for provider factory detection logic
- Create unit tests for Supabase URL construction
- Create integration test fixtures with mock Supabase config
- Test connection pooling behavior with transaction mode

Dependencies: Requires task-1, task-2 to be complete

Reference: openspec/changes/add-supabase-cloud-database/specs/database-provider/spec.md
close_reason: Created comprehensive provider tests: test_providers.py with 26 tests covering detection logic, LocalPostgresProvider, SupabaseProvider, factory function, and protocol compliance.

title: Validation and regression testing
description:
Task 6.1-6.4: Validation

- Test local PostgreSQL still works (regression)
- Test Supabase free tier connection
- Verify Alembic migrations work with Supabase direct URL
- Test connection pooling under concurrent load

Dependencies: Requires all other tasks to be complete

Reference: openspec/changes/add-supabase-cloud-database/tasks.md
close_reason: Validation complete: Local PostgreSQL works (regression test), 69 tests passed, linting clean, mypy type checking passed, Alembic migrations verified.

title: Create unit tests for Neon provider
description: Create tests/test_storage/test_neon_provider.py and test_neon_branch.py with unit tests for URL detection, pooled/direct URL conversion, engine options, mocked API responses, and error handling.

title: Test Railway PostgreSQL Docker image locally
description: Build and test the custom Railway PostgreSQL Docker image locally. Verify all extensions (pgvector, pg_search, pgmq, pg_cron) load correctly via pg_available_extensions. Covers original tasks 1.6 and 1.7 from add-railway-providers.

title: Create NeonBranchManager class
description: Create src/storage/providers/neon_branch.py with NeonBranchManager class for Neon API branch operations. Include async create_branch, delete_branch, list_branches, get_connection_string methods with exponential backoff.

title: Create NeonProvider class
description: Create src/storage/providers/neon.py with NeonProvider class implementing DatabaseProvider protocol. Include get_engine_url, get_engine_options, health_check, and get_direct_url methods.

title: Complete GHCR CI workflow for Railway PostgreSQL
description: Test the build-railway-postgres.yml CI workflow in a feature branch, make the GHCR package public after first successful build, and document image usage (pulling, Railway dashboard reference, version pinning, auth). Covers original tasks 2.2, 2.3, and 2.4 from add-railway-providers.

title: Update factory and settings for Neon
description: Update factory.py to detect .neon.tech URLs and instantiate NeonProvider. Add Neon settings to settings.py (neon_api_key, neon_project_id, neon_default_branch, neon_region, neon_direct_url). Update __init__.py exports.

title: Add Column Sorting to Data Tables
description: Implement sortable column headers for Content, Summary, Digest, Script, and Podcast tables. OpenSpec proposal: add-table-sorting. See openspec/changes/add-table-sorting/ for full specification.
close_reason: All 12 tasks completed - table sorting implemented for Content, Summary, Digest, Script, and Podcast tables

title: Backend: Add sort params to Content endpoint
description: Add sort_by and sort_order query parameters to GET /api/v1/contents. Define CONTENT_SORT_FIELDS whitelist. Implement dynamic SQLAlchemy ordering. File: src/api/routes/content_routes.py

title: Frontend: Add sorting to Digest table
description: Add sort state, replace TableHead with SortableTableHead for sortable columns (Type, Period, Status, Created Date), implement onSort handler. File: web/src/routes/digests.tsx

title: Frontend: Add sorting to Script table
description: Add sort state, replace TableHead with SortableTableHead for sortable columns (Digest ID, Status, Created Date), implement onSort handler. File: web/src/routes/scripts.tsx

title: Frontend: Add sorting to Podcast table
description: Add sort state, replace TableHead with SortableTableHead for sortable columns (Script ID, Duration, File Size, Status, Created Date), implement onSort handler. File: web/src/routes/podcasts.tsx

title: Backend: Add sort params to Summary endpoint
description: Add sort_by and sort_order query parameters to GET /api/v1/summaries. Define SUMMARY_SORT_FIELDS whitelist. Implement dynamic SQLAlchemy ordering. File: src/api/routes/summary_routes.py

title: Backend: Add sort params to Digest endpoint
description: Add sort_by and sort_order query parameters to GET /api/v1/digests. Define DIGEST_SORT_FIELDS whitelist. Implement dynamic SQLAlchemy ordering. File: src/api/routes/digest_routes.py

title: Backend: Add sort params to Script endpoint
description: Add sort_by and sort_order query parameters to GET /api/v1/scripts. Define SCRIPT_SORT_FIELDS whitelist. Implement dynamic SQLAlchemy ordering. File: src/api/routes/script_routes.py

title: Backend: Add sort params to Podcast endpoint
description: Add sort_by and sort_order query parameters to GET /api/v1/podcasts. Define PODCAST_SORT_FIELDS whitelist. Implement dynamic SQLAlchemy ordering. File: src/api/routes/podcast_routes.py

title: Frontend: Update filter types with sort params
description: Add SortOrder type and sort_by/sort_order to all filter interfaces: ContentFilters, SummaryFilters, DigestFilters, ScriptFilters, PodcastFilters. Update API client functions to pass sort params. Files: web/src/types/, web/src/lib/api/

title: Frontend: Create SortableTableHead component
description: Create reusable SortableTableHead component with: clickable headers, sort direction icons (asc/desc/none), hover styles, aria-sort accessibility, tri-state toggle logic. File: web/src/components/ui/sortable-table-head.tsx

title: Frontend: Add sorting to Content table
description: Add sort state to filter useState, replace TableHead with SortableTableHead for sortable columns (Title, Source, Publication, Status, Published Date, Ingested Date), implement onSort handler, reset page on sort change. File: web/src/routes/contents.tsx

title: Frontend: Add sorting to Summary table
description: Add sort state, replace TableHead with SortableTableHead for sortable columns (Title, Publication, Model Used, Created Date), implement onSort handler, reset offset on sort change. File: web/src/routes/summaries.tsx

title: Update Alembic for Neon migrations
description: Update alembic/env.py to support NEON_DIRECT_URL for migrations with direct (non-pooled) connections.
